reviews.review_description: I love what I can see and figure out but like the other review, I too cannot speak French. I love the graphics and the way this was created. For the creators of this adventure. I live in Texas in the United States.
Great graphics and music! But unfortunately I haven't figured out how to change the language, so I could only watch it in French (which I don't understand).

developer_response.body: Hi Elimi, where are you from? The app is supposed to be only available in France, in french language. Jailbirds is also available on other platforms as a 6 dof experience in english. Thank you.
